en.name: Police Escape
en.desc: Play Police Escape free online — draw a path to outrun the cops. 30 levels with keys, portals, ice, and toggle exits.
en.description: Police Escape is a turn-based chase puzzle. You play a thief who must draw a continuous escape route to the exit, while one or more police pursue via shortest-path AI. Plan your path, hit Go, and watch the chase play out — escape before they catch you! 30 hand-crafted levels introduce new mechanics every 5 stages: keys you must collect, teleport portals, ice blocks that block cells until they melt, and exits that toggle open and closed on a schedule. Play free online, no download.
en.objectives: Draw a path from thief to exit that avoids the police. Collect all required keys. Arrive at the exit when it's open.
en.howToPlay: Drag from the thief to the exit to draw your path. Press Go to commit. The thief and police advance one cell per turn; if a police catches you, you lose.

rules.controls: Drag from 🥷 to 🚪 with mouse or touch. Backtrack by dragging onto the previous cell. Press Go! to commit the path.
mechanics: Thief and police move one cell per turn
Police use BFS shortest-path AI to chase you
Path cannot cross police cells or repeat cells

tips: Plan a SHORT path — police catch up fast on long routes
Use walls to break line-of-sight between you and the police
Patrol points tell you where idle police drift — exploit them
On toggle levels, time your arrival for an open tick
Portals are optional — use them only when they shorten your route

faq.question: How do police move?
faq.answer: Each police computes the BFS shortest path to your CURRENT cell and steps one square along it. If they can't reach you (walled off), they walk toward their patrol point.

faq.question: Why did I lose when our paths didn't overlap?
faq.answer: If the thief and a police trade cells in the same turn (thief moves into police's old spot while police moves into thief's old spot), that counts as a capture.

faq.question: Are the levels solvable?
faq.answer: Yes. Every one of the 30 levels was verified solvable by a backtracking solver before shipping — there is always at least one winning path.

faq.question: Does my progress save?
faq.answer: Yes, progress (unlocked levels and best step counts) is saved to your browser's localStorage. Clearing browser data resets it.

faq.question: Can I replay earlier levels?
faq.answer: Yes. The level-select screen shows every unlocked level with your best step count, so you can revisit and improve.

faq.question: Is it free?
faq.answer: Yes — play Police Escape free online at ruleword.com. No download, no signup, no ads.

zh.name: 警察与小偷
zh.desc: 免费在线玩《警察与小偷》——划线规划逃跑路线，躲开警察追捕。30关，含钥匙、传送门、冰块、切换出口。
zh.description: 《警察与小偷》是一款回合制追逐解谜游戏。你扮演小偷，需要划出一条连续的逃跑路线到达出口，而一个或多个警察会按最短路径追捕你。规划好路线，按下出发，观看追逐展开——在被抓住之前逃出去！30关手工设计的关卡，每5关引入一个新机制：必须收集的钥匙、传送管道、融化前阻挡通行的冰块、按时开关的切换出口。免费在线玩，无需下载。
zh.objectives: 画出从起点到出口的逃跑路径，避开警察。收集所有必需的钥匙，在出口开放时到达。
zh.howToPlay: 从🥷拖到🚪画出路径，按出发提交。小偷和警察每回合各走一格，被警察抓住则失败。

rules.controls: 用鼠标或手指从🥷拖到🚪画路径。拖回上一格可撤销。按出发提交路径。
mechanics: 小偷和警察每回合各走一格
警察使用 BFS 最短路径 AI 追你
路径不能与警察相交，不能重复经过格子
到达出口前必须收集所有钥匙
features: 钥匙(L6)、传送门(L11)、冰块(L16)、出口切换(L21)

tips: 规划短路径——长路线会被警察追上
用墙挡住你和警察之间的视线
巡逻点告诉你警察闲时会去哪里，加以利用
出口切换关卡，要在开放时刻到达
传送门是可选的——只在能缩短路径时使用

faq.question: 警察怎么移动？
faq.answer: 每个警察计算到达你当前位置的 BFS 最短路径，并沿路径走一格。如果他们无法到达你（被墙挡住），会朝巡逻点走。

faq.question: 为什么路径没重叠也算输？
faq.answer: 如果小偷和警察在同一回合交换位置（小偷走到警察的旧位置，警察走到小偷的旧位置），也算被抓。

faq.question: 关卡都是可解的吗？
faq.answer: 是的。30关每一关都经过回溯求解器验证至少有一条合法解后才发布。

faq.question: 进度会保存吗？
faq.answer: 会。进度（已解锁关卡和最佳步数）保存在浏览器 localStorage 中。清除浏览器数据会重置。

faq.question: 可以重玩之前的关卡吗？
faq.answer: 可以。关卡选择界面显示每个已解锁关卡和你的最佳步数，可以随时回放挑战。

faq.question: 免费吗？
faq.answer: 免费——在 ruleword.com 免费在线玩《警察与小偷》。无需下载、无需注册、无广告。
